common.serverOffline: OmniRoute server is offline. Start it with: omniroute serve
common.authRequired: Authentication required. Set OMNIROUTE_API_KEY or run: omniroute setup

setup.title: OmniRoute Setup
setup.opencode: Install and configure the bundled @omniroute/opencode-plugin for OpenCode

doctor.title: OmniRoute Doctor
doctor.portConflict: Port {port}: in use by another process

providers.title: Providers
providers.noProviders: No providers configured. Run: omniroute setup

metrics.description: Show provider performance metrics (latency, success rate, cost)
metrics.metric: Focus on a specific metric field
metrics.compare: Comma-separated provider IDs to compare side-by-side

metric_single.description: Get a single metric value for a specific connection

rotate.description: Rotate the upstream API key for a provider connection
rotate.fromEnvOpt: Read new key from environment variable VAR
rotate.dryRunOpt: Print what would change without writing
rotate.dryRunResult: [dry-run] Would rotate key for "{name}" ({id}). No changes made.
rotate.envVarEmpty: Environment variable {var} is not set or is empty.
rotate.success: Key rotated for "{name}". Run `providers test {id}` to verify.

status.description: Show key health for all provider connections (age, expiry, cooldown)
status.header: ID         Provider       Name                     Expiry Status  Test Status  Cooldown Until
status.requiresServer: providers status requires the OmniRoute server to be running.

keys.title: API Keys
keys.addDescription: Add or update an API key for a provider
keys.removeDescription: Remove an API key for a provider
keys.revealDescription: Reveal the unmasked API key value
keys.usageDescription: Show recent usage for an API key
keys.rotateDescription: Generate a new key and invalidate the old one
keys.graceOpt: Grace period (ms) before the old key is invalidated
keys.stdinOpt: Read API key from stdin instead of argument
keys.confirmRotate: Rotate key {id}? (old key will be invalidated after grace period)
keys.revealWarning: ⚠  This will display the full unmasked key. Ensure your screen is private.
keys.stdinEmpty: No API key provided via stdin.

policy.title: Key Policy
policy.showDescription: Show rate/cost policy for a key
policy.setDescription: Set rate/cost policy for a key
policy.nothingToSet: No policy fields provided. Use --rate-limit, --max-cost, or --allowed-models.

expiration.title: Key Expiration
expiration.daysOpt: Show keys expiring within N days

stream.description: Stream a chat response with SSE inspection modes
stream.combo: Force a specific combo by name
stream.raw: Print raw SSE lines as received
stream.debug: Print per-chunk timing info to stderr
stream.save: Save all SSE events to a .jsonl file

error.empty_prompt: Error: prompt is required (positional arg, --file, or --stdin)

cost.description: Show cost report with breakdown by provider, model, combo, or API key
cost.api_key_filter: Filter by a specific API key
cost.limit: Maximum number of rows to show (default: 100)

simulate.description: Dry-run routing simulation — show which providers would be selected without calling upstream
simulate.file: Load full request body from JSON file
simulate.combo: Force a specific combo by name
simulate.explain: Print fallback tree and cost range to stderr
simulate.noCombo: No matching combo found. Configure one with: omniroute combo create

chat.description: Send a one-shot chat prompt to OmniRoute
chat.combo: Force a specific combo by name

error.empty_prompt: Error: prompt is required (positional arg, --file, or --stdin)

serve.daemon: Run server as a background daemon
serve.max_restarts: Max crash restarts within 30s before giving up (default: 2)
serve.tray: Show system tray icon (desktop only, opt-in)

health.description: Check server health and component status
health.noServer: Server not running. Start with: omniroute serve
health.title: Health

test.noServer: Server not running. Start with: omniroute serve
test.repeatOpt: Repeat test N times and aggregate results
test.saveOpt: Save results to a JSON file
test.compareMinTwo: At least two models required for --compare (comma-separated)
test.noProviders: No providers configured. Add one with: omniroute keys add

update.done: Updated to {latest}. Restart the server to apply.

stop.portFallback: No PID file found, attempting port-based stop...

dashboard.description: Open the OmniRoute dashboard in a browser
dashboard.urlOnly: Print dashboard URL without opening browser
dashboard.tui: Open interactive TUI dashboard (terminal UI, 7 tabs)

models.search: Filter models by id, name, provider, or description
models.noServer: Server not running. Start with: omniroute serve

providers.description: List OAuth-capable providers and their flow types

start.description: Start OAuth authorization flow for a provider
start.no_browser: Print URL only — do not open browser
start.import_system: Auto-import credentials from local system config
start.social: Social login provider (google|github) — required for kiro
start.timeout: Timeout waiting for authorization in ms (default: 300000)

revoke.connection_id: Revoke a specific connection by ID

program.description: OmniRoute — Smart AI Router with Auto Fallback
program.context: Server context/profile to use for this command

open.description: Open a specific OmniRoute dashboard page in the browser
open.url: Print URL only, do not open browser

contexts.description: Manage server contexts/profiles (add, use, list, show, remove, rename, export, import)

lang.getDescription: Show the currently active language code
lang.setDescription: Set the display language and save it to config
lang.noCode: Language code required. Run 'omniroute config lang list' to see available codes.
lang.unknown: Unknown language code: {code}. Run 'omniroute config lang list' to see available codes.
lang.envHint: Tip: you can also set OMNIROUTE_LANG={code} in your environment.

completion.description: Generate or install shell completion scripts
completion.install: Install completion script globally for detected shell

tray.show: Show the tray icon (if server is running with --tray)

autostart.description: Manage OmniRoute autostart at boot (Linux: systemd user service)

configure.description: Pick a provider+model from the active server and write a local CLI config
